summary: With the phantom-sell fix now DEPLOYED (commit a5484b6, 13:44Z: last_price layers Alpaca IEX -> broker current_price with staleness gates, stops fire every 5 min), the book's biggest risk shifts from operational back to the standing dilution overhang -- UUUU's undrawn $300M ATM with net-NEGATIVE insider flow (Chalmers Form 144 sales > CEO buys) and NTSK's live post-lockup distribution -- while WRAP/NTSK price caches remain stale in the nightly audit but no longer threaten a false stop; broker_state reconciles all 5 positions on shares and a same-cycle re-sweep confirms NO fresh July offering on any held name.

WRAP.note: In nightly audit (broker_disagrees 38.9%: cache 1.555 last 7/8 vs broker 2.13-2.19; stale_cache) so graded up a notch -- BUT the acute phantom-sell vector is now MITIGATED: fix a5484b6 (13:44Z) layers live last_price + staleness gates so a stale cache no longer drives the $2.03 stop. Dilution: $200M universal baby-shelf on a sub-$100M name = drip CAPACITY only, NO July 424B5 draw; recent insider activity is BUYING; 7/15 Wraptor MX PR is incremental. Lorentzian -0.5, FinBERT +0.019. Position +$1.45 at $2.13.

UUUU.note: $300M Controlled Equity ATM (#333-278193) confirmed still UNDRAWN -- no July prospectus draw. Insider picture net-NEGATIVE by size: Chalmers Form 144 stack via RBC (~800k sh 6/29-7/9, ~$10M+) outweighs Bhappu 74k/$968k + Hansen buys. Lorentzian k-NN -0.75, FinBERT 0.0. Not in tonight's audit. Position -$2.40 at $13.06.

CAI.note: Clean fundamentals: director $990k buy 7/13, Caris Detect launch, $100M buyback, NO shelf/ATM; Goldman initiated Buy $27 PT / Evercore $25 above ~$17. FinBERT +0.144. Not in audit; reconciles on shares. Position -$0.50 at $17.08 (immaterial).

NTSK.note: Book's best gainer +$7.72 at $14.65 on an intact breakout, RAISED on data quality: audit broker_disagrees 14.2% (cache 12.61 vs broker 14.65) -- but stops now gated by the live feed (fix a5484b6). Live post-lockup distribution overhang persists (Form 144 1.75M Class A 7/8 + Lightspeed VC sales 7/8-7/9) only partly offset by ICONIQ/Makan/Griffith + 241k director buys. Hiring pulse 148 (prev 150), flat -- no posting-pull. FinBERT +0.158. Re-sweep: NO 424B5/secondary.

YEXT.note: NO shelf/ATM; failed Feb take-private replaced by anti-dilutive $140M self-tender. Audit shows only a minor 3.9% broker_disagrees (cache 5.22 vs broker 5.58) -- immaterial and cache still sits above the $5.00 stop. Hiring pulse 25 (prev 24), flat. FinBERT 0.0. Position +$1.21 at $5.58.

disagreements: UPDATE vs intel (13:37Z): intel's WRAP alert still calls the stale-cache phantom-sell 'the live operational issue' and asks the human/reconciler to confirm the live feed drives stops -- but fix a5484b6 deployed at 13:44Z (AFTER intel ran) already layers live last_price (Alpaca IEX -> broker current_price) with staleness gates and moves stop checks to every 5 min, so that vector is now gated. The cache desync remains a data-hygiene item, not an acute exit risk.

UUUU: intel frames the Bhappu/Hansen insider BUYS prominently ('no boost'); the Chalmers Form 144 SALE stack (~800k sh 6/29-7/9 via RBC, ~$10M+) outweighs the ~$1M of buying by size, so the insider signal behind the score is net-NEGATIVE -- reinforces the elevated grade.

NTSK: intel narrates the ICONIQ/Makan/Griffith BUYS as the story; the offsetting Lightspeed VC sales (7/8-7/9) plus the 7/8 Form 144 (1.75M Class A) are a live post-lockup distribution overhang -- the net float pressure is why this stays elevated despite the +$7.72 gain.

ARTV: intel does not cover it; the +4.0 insider score driving its 5.17 scan rank is offering-backer/healthcare-fund accumulation into a $300M raise the stock is now underwater on (~$9.06 vs $11.52 offer), NOT management conviction -- treat as dilution overhang, not a buy signal.

AVO: intel carries it as a top non-held name on a +5.0 insider score, but that signal is GlobalHarvest/Jay Pack takeover-style accumulation that triggered a poison-pill rights plan, NOT management conviction; below the buy line so no flag, but the insider component is mis-attributed.
Overtrading (carried, unchanged): radar shows weekly buy budget 9/4 used -- more than double the 4-buy weekly cap. Standalone discipline flag independent of any single ticker.
